zh.lifeSummary: 當Giles Chapman Sr.於1651年9月15日出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特斯瓦納時，他的父親Thomas Giles Chapman21歲，母親Katherine Gillingham16歲。他於大約1700年與ElizabethVan Winkle Anderson在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1705年在英國多瑟特斯瓦納享年54歲，埋葬在英國多瑟特斯瓦納。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Giles Chapman Sr.于1651年9月15日出生在英国英格兰多瑟特斯瓦納时，他的父亲Thomas Giles Chapman21岁，母亲Katherine Gillingham16岁。他于大约1700年与ElizabethVan Winkle Anderson在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1705年在英国多瑟特斯瓦納享年54岁，埋葬在英国多瑟特斯瓦納。

nameMeanings.name: Chapman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a merchant or trader, Middle English chap(pe)man, chepman, Old English cēapmann, cēpemann, a compound of cēap ‘barter, bargain, price, property’ + mann ‘man’.
Jewish: adopted probably for a like-sounding or like-meaning name in some other European language; see for example   Kaufman  .

History: This name was brought independently to North America from England by numerous different bearers from the 17th century onward. John Chapmen (sic) was one of the free planters who assented to the ‘Fundamental Agreement’ of the New Haven Colony on June 4, 1639.

variants.name: Kaufman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Meyer, Chaim, Emanuel, Moshe, Eytan, Herschel, Zvi, Ari, Aron.
Americanized form of German   Kaufmann  , and a variant of the same Jewish surname.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the personal name Kaufman meaning ‘merchant’. Compare Koyfman 2.

variants.name: Chipman
meanings: English: from Middle English chipman (Old English cȳp(e)mann), a side form of chapman, chepman ‘merchant, trader’; see Chapman , with which this name was interchangeable.

variants.name: Copeman
meanings: English (Norfolk and Suffolk): patronymic from the early Middle English personal name Cop(e)man, an Anglicized form of Old Scandinavian Kaupmaðr. It is a transferred use of Old Scandinavian kaupmaðr (Old Danish køpman) ‘merchant’, cognate with Old English cēapmann (see Chapman ), but there is no evidence for the occupational term in Middle English.
Americanized form of North German   Koopmann   or Dutch   Koopman  .

nameMeanings.name: Giles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Much altered English vernacular form of the Late Latin name Aegidius, from Greek Aigidios (a derivative of aigidion ‘kid, young goat’), via Old French Gide. It was the name of an 8th‐century saint who, according to tradition, was an Athenian citizen who fled to Provence because he could not cope with the fame and adulation caused by his power to work miracles, in particular by healing the lame and crippled. This was not a particularly common name in the Middle Ages and its use seems to have been confined to certain families and localities.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Giles Chapman Sr. was born on 15 September 1651, in Swanage, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Giles Chapman, was 21 and his mother, Katherine Gillingham, was 16. He married ElizabethVan Winkle Anderson about 1700, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1705, in Swanage, Dorset, England, at the age of 54, and was buried in Swanage, Dorset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Giles Chapman Sr. est né le 15 septembre 1651, à Swanage, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Giles Chapman, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Katherine Gillingham, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé ElizabethVan Winkle Anderson environ 1700, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1705, à Swanage, Dorset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Swanage, Dorset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Giles Chapman Sr. am 15. September 1651 in Swanage, Dorset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Giles Chapman 21 und seine Mutter Katherine Gillingham 16. Er hat um 1700 in England, United Kingdom ElizabethVan Winkle Anderson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1705 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Swanage, Dorset, England und wurde in Swanage, Dorset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Giles Chapman Sr. è nato il il 15 settembre 1651 nel Swanage, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Giles Chapman, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Katherine Gillingham, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato ElizabethVan Winkle Anderson circa 1700, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1705, nel Swanage, Dorset, England, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Swanage, Dorset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Giles Chapman Sr.が1651年9月15日にイギリスイギリスドールセトスワナッジで生まれた時，父Thomas Giles Chapmanは21歳，母Katherine Gillinghamは16歳であった。約1700年にイギリスイギリスでElizabethVan Winkle Andersonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1705年にイギリスドールセトスワナッジで54歳で死去し，イギリスドールセトスワナッジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Giles Chapman Sr.(이)가 1651년 9월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 스와나지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Giles Chapman(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Gillingham(은)는 16세였다. 그는 대략 1700년 영국 잉글랜드에서 ElizabethVan Winkle Anderson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1705년 영국 도르세트 스와나지에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 도르세트 스와나지에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Giles Chapman Sr. nasceu em 15 de setembro de 1651, em Swanage, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Giles Chapman, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Gillingham, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com ElizabethVan Winkle Anderson aproximadamente 1700, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1705, em Swanage, Dorset, Inglaterra, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Swanage, Dorset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Giles Chapman Sr. родился 15 сентября 1651 г. в местности сванадж, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Giles Chapman было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Katherine Gillingham, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени ElizabethVan Winkle Anderson около 1700 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1705 г. в местности сванадж, дорсет, Англия в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности сванадж, дорсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Giles Chapman Sr. nació el 15 de septiembre de 1651, en Swanage, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Giles Chapman, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Katherine Gillingham, tenía 16 años. Se casó con ElizabethVan Winkle Anderson aproximadamente 1700, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1705, en Swanage, Dorset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Swanage, Dorset, Inglaterra.
